title: centaurea solstitialis subsp. adami
intro: Centaurea solstitialis subsp. adami, also known as a subspecies of the Centaurea solstitialis plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. The herbal preparations of Centaurea solstitialis subsp. adami typically involve drying the plant's flowers and leaves, followed by infusion or decoction in hot water, to make teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
